title: Deploy cadence discussion (week 3)
content:
Desmond: New rule: we only deploy to prod on Tuesdays. No exceptions.
Alice Chen: Makes sense, gives us Monday to prep and Wednesday to monitor.
Bob Kim: Agreed. Updating the runbook now.

title: Lunch plans
content:
Bob Kim: Anyone up for tacos?
Carol Diaz: Yes! The new place on 5th?
Bob Kim: Perfect, noon works.

title: Bob's code review
content:
@bob: I'll take the review for PR #55.
Desmond: Thanks Bob Kim!

title: Alice Chen infra review
content:
Alice Chen: I reviewed the Terraform changes. LGTM, ship it.
Desmond: Thanks Alice! Deploying now. CC @alice on the deploy thread.

title: Week 4: microbots SurrealDB progress
content:
Desmond: Pushed schema updates for week 4. HNSW indexes are looking good.
Bob Kim: Nice! Did you verify the embedding DIMENSION matches?
Desmond: Yes, 1536 — matches the OpenAI embeddings. All green.
